heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 91–173, title V, § 50983 Stat. 803Dec. 30, 1969
label: 451 to 483 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 91–173, title V, § 50983 Stat. 803Dec. 30, 1969
notes: Sections 451 to 460 comprised subchapter I of this chapter.

Section 451, , title 1, § 101, formerly § 1, ; renumbered title I, § 101, , , authorized Secretary of the Interior to make annual investigations of coal mines to obtain information relating to health and safety conditions.act May 7, 1941, ch. 8755 Stat. 177July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 4(4)66 Stat. 710

Section 452, , formerly § 2, ; renumbered title I, § 102, and amended , (5), (6), , empowered Secretary of the Interior to make inspections at any time.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title I, § 10255 Stat. 178July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 4(3)66 Stat. 710

Section 453, , formerly § 3, ; renumbered title I, § 103, and amended , (7), , authorized investigators to enter any mine affecting interstate commerce.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title I, § 10355 Stat. 178July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 4(5)66 Stat. 710

Section 454, , formerly § 4, ; renumbered title I, § 104, and amended , (7), (8), , provided for penalty for refusal to admit investigator.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title I, § 10455 Stat. 178July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 4(5)66 Stat. 709

Section 455, , formerly § 5, ; renumbered title I, § 105, and amended , §§ 3, 4(5), , 710, provided for filing of accident information.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title I, § 10555 Stat. 178July 16, 1952, ch. 87766 Stat. 709

Section 456, , formerly § 6, ; renumbered title I, § 106, and amended , (5), , directed Secretary of the Interior to compile and publish reports and to expend funds for advancement of health and safety in mines.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title I, § 10655 Stat. 178July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 4(3)66 Stat. 710

Section 457, , formerly § 7, ; renumbered title I, § 107, and amended , (5), (9), , provided for administration of provisions of sections 451 to 460 of this title by Bureau of Mines and directed Federal agencies to cooperate with State mine safety agencies.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title I, § 10755 Stat. 179July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 4(3)66 Stat. 710

Section 458, , formerly § 8, ; renumbered title I, § 108, and amended , (5), , authorized creation of an advisory committee and provided for its functions and composition.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title I, § 10855 Stat. 179July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 4(3)66 Stat. 710

Section 459, , formerly § 9, ; renumbered title I, § 109, and amended , ; , (5), , authorized employment of personnel for administration of sections 451 to 460 of this title and set out qualification conditions.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title I, § 10955 Stat. 179Oct. 28, 1949, ch. 782, § 1106(a)63 Stat. 972July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 4(3)66 Stat. 710

Section 460, , formerly 11, ; renumbered title I, § 110, and amended , (5), , defined “Commerce” as used in sections 451 to 460 of this title.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title I, § 11155 Stat. 179July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 4(3)66 Stat. 710
Sections 471 to 483 comprised subchapter II of this chapter.

Section 471, , as added , ; amended , , , defined terms as used in sections 471 to 483 of this title.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title II, § 201July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 166 Stat. 692Pub. L. 89–376, § 2(a)80 Stat. 84Mar. 26, 1966

Section 472, , as added , ; amended , , , set out provisions for annual and special instructions, directed Federal agencies to coordinate operations with State mine safety agencies created pursuant to enumerated conditions and authorized any such State inspector to enter any mine affecting commerce.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title II, § 202July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 166 Stat. 693Pub. L. 89–376, § 3(b)80 Stat. 87Mar. 26, 1966

Section 473, , as added , ; amended , , , set out procedures for withdrawal when immediate or nonimmediate dangers were found to exist in mines.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title II, § 203July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 166 Stat. 694Pub. L. 89–376, § 3(a)80 Stat. 85Mar. 26, 1966
Section 474, , as added , , set out procedures for giving notice of findings and orders.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title II, § 204July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 166 Stat. 696

Section 475, , as added , ; amended , , (d), , authorized continuation of Federal Coal Mine Safety Board of Review and provided for its composition, powers, and procedures.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title II, § 205July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 166 Stat. 697Pub. L. 89–376, § 3(c)80 Stat. 87Mar. 26, 1966

Section 476, , as added , ; amended , , , set out procedures for Director of Bureau of Mines to review applications for annulment or revision of orders closing mines because of immediate and nonimmediate dangers.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title II, § 206July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 166 Stat. 699Pub. L. 89–376, § 3(e)80 Stat. 88Mar. 26, 1966

Section 477, , as added , ; amended , , (23), ; , , , set out procedures for review by Federal Coal Mine Safety Board of Review of applications for annulment or revision of orders closing mines because of immediate or nonimmediate dangers.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title II, § 207July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 166 Stat. 700Pub. L. 86–507, § 1(22)74 Stat. 201Pub. L. 89–376, § 3(f)80 Stat. 90June 11, 1960Mar. 26, 1966

Section 478, , as added , ; amended , , , set out procedures for judicial review of orders by Federal Coal Mine Safety Board of Review.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title II, § 208July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 166 Stat. 702Pub. L. 86–507, § 1(24)74 Stat. 201June 11, 1960

Section 479, , as added , , set out mandatory mine safety provisions respecting roof support, ventilation, coal dust and rock dust, electrical equipment, fire protection, and other miscellaneous matters.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title II, § 209July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 166 Stat. 703

Section 480, , as added , ; amended , , , set out penalties for violations of provisions of sections 473 or 476 of this title.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title II, § 210July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 166 Stat. 708Pub. L. 89–376, § 480 Stat. 91Mar. 26, 1966
Section 481, , as added , , provided for effect on State laws of provisions of sections 471 to 483 of this title.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title II, § 211July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 166 Stat. 708

Section 482, , as added , ; amended , , , set out procedures for issuance of certificates of equipment conformity, expanded educational programs, directed Federal agencies to coordinate their activities with State agencies to eliminate duplication of efforts, expenses and enforcement requirements, and provided that Director annually report on administration of his functions.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title II, § 212July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 166 Stat. 709Pub. L. 89–376, § 580 Stat. 91Mar. 26, 1966

Section 483, , as added , , provided that Administrative Procedure Act was not to be applicable to provisions of sections 471 to 483 of this title.act May 7, 1941, ch. 87, title II, § 213July 16, 1952, ch. 877, § 166 Stat. 709
For subject matter formerly contained in this chapter, see section 801 et seq. of this title.
